un.caen.model.player

Interface Fighter

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    HeavyFighter, LightFighter, Player

    public interface Fighter
    Represents a fighter in the game. This interface defines the essential methods for any entity that can fight, including managing energy and weapon limits.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int getEnergy()
      Gets the current energy of the fighter.
      int getWeaponsLimits()
      Gets the limit on the number of weapons the fighter can carry.
      void reduceEnergy(int damage)
      Reduces the fighter's energy by the specified damage amount.

    • Method Detail

      • getEnergy

        int getEnergy()
        Gets the current energy of the fighter.
        Returns:
        the current energy level of the fighter

      • getWeaponsLimits

        int getWeaponsLimits()
        Gets the limit on the number of weapons the fighter can carry.
        Returns:
        the maximum number of weapons allowed for the fighter

      • reduceEnergy

        void reduceEnergy(int damage)
        Reduces the fighter's energy by the specified damage amount.
        Parameters:
        damage - the amount of energy to reduce
